title: L-MTP: Leap Multi-Token Prediction Beyond Adjacent Context for Large Language Models

repos.name: Xiaohao-Liu__L-MTP
repos.evidence: README title is 'L-MTP: Leap Multi-Token Prediction Beyond Adjacent Context for Large Language Models' with NeurIPS 2025 badge and arXiv:2505.17505; repo owner Xiaohao-Liu matches first author Xiaohao Liu; all 9 co-authors listed in README match metadata.txt exactly; paper itself states 'source code is available at https://github.com/Xiaohao-Liu/L-MTP' (paper_text.txt line 30); repo contains models/lmtp/ implementing the leap multi-token prediction core, LLaMA-Factory training integration, per-model configs, and eval/ scripts specific to this method.

rationale: Single repo cloned is unambiguously the paper's own implementation: paper-stated URL, exact title and author match, and method-specific code (models/lmtp/, leap stride logic, two-stage training configs). All audit findings were correctly written against this core repo. No baseline, dependency, or off-paper repos were cloned.
audit_impact: None. All findings (2 missing, 2 bug/high, 3 difference) were written against the correct core repo. The audit correctly classified the paper as source-present and its findings stand.
recommended_action: No action required on provenance. The existing findings (missing-medusa-module, hardcoded-storage-path, skip-token-mismatch, num-heads-mismatch, speedup-measurement-missing, leap-start-offset) are all directed at the right code and remain valid for author follow-up.
